title: asplenium howeanum
intro: Asplenium howeanum, also known as the Howea fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Asplenium howeanum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties that can help to protect against cell damage. Asplenium howeanum can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
